personal.name: Owais Javaid
personal.title: Creative Designer & Visual Storyteller
personal.description: Creative Designer & Visual Storyteller based in Karachi. I craft brand identities, design campaigns, and produce video content that makes organizations unforgettable.
bio: I'm Owais Javaid, a Creative Designer and Visual Storyteller based in Karachi, Pakistan. Over the past 4+ years, I've been making sure the right message reaches the right people — beautifully.

My work spans brand identity, graphic design, video production, and digital content, built for organizations that want to make a real impression. Currently, I'm at Patients' Aid Foundation, where I translate a life-saving healthcare mission into compelling visual campaigns.
personal.quote: I don't just make things look good. I ask: what do we want people to feel? What action should they take? Then I design backward from that answer.
personal.contactCTA: If you're a nonprofit, startup, or brand that needs a designer who cares about the work as much as you do — let's talk.

services.title: Brand Identity
services.description: Logos, visual systems, and brand guidelines that are consistent and ownable.

services.title: Video Production
services.description: From concept to final cut — cinematography and motion graphics.

services.title: Graphic Design
services.description: Social media creatives, posters, marketing materials, and digital assets.

services.title: Digital Content
services.description: Campaign visuals, email templates, and performance-focused ad creatives.

projects.title: Mehndi Clothing | Visual Identity & Campaign
projects.description: Designed premium brand identity, visual guidelines, and digital campaign templates for Mehndi Clothing, highlighting traditional wear styling and modern cultural typography.

projects.title: Creative Agency | Social Media Templates
projects.description: Built uniform graphic templates and grid layouts for digital agency client accounts, standardizing their social media presence.

projects.title: Narrative Short Film | Cinematography & Direction
projects.description: A cinematic independent short film exploring human connection. Handled full production, including scripting, camera operation, and color grading.

projects.title: Higher Education TVC | Cinematography & Editing
projects.description: Television commercial produced for a leading academic institution. Directed cinematography, post-production editing, and sound design.

projects.title: Nonprofit Storytelling | Motion Graphics & Video
projects.description: Short-form brand narrative video showcasing community impact programs, utilizing documentary editing style and custom motion graphics.

projects.title: Academic Event | Visual Identity & Collateral
projects.description: Designed a comprehensive print identity suite for a healthcare academy event, including a large-format outdoor billboard campaign, informative roll-up banners, custom formal invitation layouts, and elegant honors appreciation certificates.

projects.title: Luxury Apparel | Web Banner Design
projects.description: Designed a minimalist and elegant e-commerce landing page hero banner for a premium silk scarf collection, showcasing product styling and modern typography.

projects.title: Fashion Retail | Seasonal Ad Campaign I
projects.description: A compilation of promotional social media campaigns designed for a retail clothing brand, featuring 11.11, Summer Clearance, and seasonal sales.

projects.title: Fashion Retail | Seasonal Ad Campaign II
projects.description: Designed visual lookbooks and campaign banners for seasonal viscose, khaddar, and premium velvet clothing collections across digital channels.

projects.title: Skincare & Beauty | Social Media Graphics
projects.description: Created promotional social media campaigns and product showcase posts for skincare and cosmetics retail brands.

projects.title: Digital Agency | Services Carousel Design
projects.description: Designed a cohesive set of social media posts, carousel designs, and digital ad banners showcasing digital marketing, SEO, and web development services.

projects.title: Creative Studio | Services Portfolio Banner
projects.description: A promotional banner designed for freelance platforms, showcasing a collage of diverse client projects ranging from real estate 3D designs to app promotions.

projects.title: Cosmetics Brand | Social Ad Creatives

projects.title: Urban Footwear | Mobile App UI/UX

projects.title: Textile Recruitment | Subway Station Billboard

projects.title: Real Estate Marketing | YouTube Visuals
projects.description: Designed a series of highly engaging, high-contrast YouTube thumbnails for a real estate agency, promoting luxury house walkthrough tours.

projects.title: Social Media Agency | Promotional Showcase
projects.description: A services showcase banner displaying a grid of custom-designed social media posts for real estate, cosmetics, food, and corporate brands.

projects.title: Modern Glazing | Social Media Campaign
projects.description: A comprehensive social media marketing campaign designed for Braham Glazing, a London-based UPVC doors and windows provider, showcasing product features, eco-friendly benefits, and soundproofing solutions.

experience.title: Creative Designer
points: Designed visual campaigns for Pakistan's leading healthcare nonprofit, producing assets/month across social, print, and digital channels.
Developed a consistent brand visual language across all patient-facing materials, improving campaign cohesion and donor recognition.
Produced short-form video content for social media that increased average post engagement by 70%.

experience.title: Creative Specialist
points: Designed performance-focused creatives for digital ad campaigns, supporting paid social strategies for brand clients.
Collaborated with marketing teams to translate campaign objectives into visuals — delivered on tight deadlines with zero revision rejections.
Built graphic templates reused across multiple client accounts, cutting production time by approximately 25%.

experience.title: Senior Graphic Designer
points: Created branded marketing collateral, including brochures, banners, and digital assets for multiple brands.
Supported internal communications design needs, ensuring visual consistency across departments.
Incorporated client feedback across multiple rounds to deliver final-approved assets.

experience.title: Freelance Designer
points: Delivered brand identity packages (logo, color system, typography) for clients across e-commerce, retail, and services.
Managed full design lifecycle independently — from client brief to final delivery — with a 60% repeat client rate.
Created social media content calendars and visual templates that reduced content creation time by 40%.

experience.title: Graphic Designer
points: Created visually stunning graphics, logos, and branding elements for corporate clients.
Developed innovative design concepts that met and exceeded client expectations.
Proficient in Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign).

education.degree: Diploma of Visual Effects and Multimedia
education.institution: NED University of Engineering and Technology
